properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine’s top strike-drone maker moves into ballistic missile defense
properties.descricao: Fire Point's drones already fly most of Kyiv's strikes inside Russia. With Germany's Hensoldt, the company is now building Freyja, a homegrown alternative.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine’s newest strike weapon drifts into Russia on the wind
properties.descricao: The U.S. and Russia are fielding the same balloons used by Ukraine that bait air defenses and now launch missiles.

properties.titulo_evento: Philippines deploys US-made Triton naval drones in its western waters to scout for intruders
properties.descricao: The transfer comes after the military revealed that China discreetly deployed a 6x6 meter floating platform equipped with an antenna at Scarborough Shoal.

properties.titulo_evento: Poland buys V-BAT drones to boost Baltic Sea naval operations
properties.descricao: The deal puts Poland in line to become the first country on NATO’s eastern flank to acquire the Shield AI-made drone.

properties.titulo_evento: White House asks Congress for $87.6 billion, mostly for Iran war
properties.descricao: The request includes $67.15 billion for the military, including $21 billion for munitions and to strengthen the U.S. industrial base.

properties.descricao: Germany Navy leaders have already blessed the fallback ships as capable of meeting NATO capability requirements, but an alliance deadline looms.

properties.titulo_evento: Tank maker KNDS plans stock market listing, Germany to buy 40% stake
properties.descricao: The firm showed a proposed battle tank at Eurosatory defense exhibition in Paris boasting a French turret and gun mounted on a German Leopard 2 chassis.

properties.descricao: Israeli and Lebanese delegations will continue their talks on Friday.

properties.descricao: Satellite images compare Venezuela's coastal city of La Guaira before and after twin earthquakes struck.

properties.descricao: Despite ceasefires and shifting military fronts, Israel’s wars continue, with no clear end or lasting security gains.

properties.descricao: Emergency crews are racing to rescue hundreds trapped under collapsed buildings after earthquakes struck Venezuela.

properties.descricao: France seizes fifth Russian ‘shadow fleet’ tanker linked to funding Ukraine war.

properties.descricao: Plan International said children and young people must be at the centre of Venezuela's earthquake response.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war live: IAEA hopes to inspect nuclear sites ‘as soon as possible’
properties.descricao: IAEA head Rafael Grossi says agency has been tasked with inspecting Iran’s nuclear sites as part of the US-Iran deal.

properties.descricao: The UN says it is scaling up its response after twin earthquakes devastated Venezuela.

properties.descricao: Germany finish top of Group E, with Ivory Coast second and Ecuador will have a chance of qualifying on third place.

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela earthquakes live: Rescue efforts intensify as death toll hits 235
properties.descricao: Residents are trapped beneath rubble of collapsed buildings after two major quakes hit Venezuela, killing at least 235.

properties.titulo_evento: Rescuers search rubble for survivors as Venezuela earthquakes kill at least 235
properties.descricao: At least 4,300 people have been injured after two seven-plus magnitude shallow quakes hit seconds apart.

properties.titulo_evento: Earthquake is devastating blow to Venezuela at time of uncertainty
properties.descricao: The twin quakes come less than six months after Venezuela's then-leader Nicolás Maduro was seized by US forces.

properties.descricao: Signs that traffic through the key Strait of Hormuz shipping route is gradually resuming has helped to push the oil price down.

properties.titulo_evento: Europe heat wave 'virtually impossible' without human impact
